name: Oriental Barbecued Ribs
recipeIngredient: 4 Slabs baby back ribs (14 to 16 oz each)
1 cup Chicken stock OR low-sodium chicken broth
recipeInstructions:
1. PREHEAT OVEN TO 375°F.
2. THE DAY BEFORE GRILLING, PLACE RIBS IN A LAYER IN A LARGE ROASTING PAN.
3. COMBINE ALL OTHER INGREDIENTS AND MIX WELL. POUR THIS MARINADE OVER THE RIBS.
4. COVER AND PLACE IN THE OVEN FOR 40 MINUTES.
5. REMOVE FROM THE OVEN, COOL, COVER AND REFRIGERATE OVERNIGHT.
6. THE NEXT DAY, LIGHT A GRILL.
7. REMOVE RIBS FROM THE MARINADE. STRAIN MARINADE INTO A BOWL, DISCARDING BITS OF ANISE AND GARLIC.
8. PLACE THE RIBS ON THE HOT GRILL AND COOK, BAISING FREQUENTLY WITH THE MARINADE.
9. PRESENT RIBS ON A PLATTER AND SERVE ANY REMAINING MARINADE AS A DIPPING SAUCE.
